title: Candace Owens and Cole Allen claims explode online as White House Correspondents Dinner questions raise deeper mystery
summary_full: Viral posts on X claim a connection between Candace Owens and Cole Allen, but there is no verified evidence. The claims rely on unrelated links and speculation. No official source or news outlet has confirmed any investigation. At this point, the story is based on online rumors, not facts, and should be treated with caution.
